description: Characterize the CCD Simulator's electronic properties by executing the photon transfer method. Acquire matched flat-field pairs (2 frames each) at three exposure levels (1s, 5s, 15s) and at least 10 bias frames (0s exposure). Save the 1s flats to /home/ga/Calibration/ccd_characterization/flats_1s/, the 5s flats to /home/ga/Calibration/ccd_characterization/flats_5s/, the 15s flats to /home/ga/Calibration/ccd_characterization/flats_15s/, and the bias frames to /home/ga/Calibration/ccd_characterization/bias/. Compute the CCD gain (e-/ADU) and read noise (e-) from these frames and write a final report to /home/ga/Documents/ccd_characterization_report.txt containing the measured gain value in e-/ADU and read noise value in e-.
